title: Bash verify-fast hotfix
summary: Forge v2.0.3 fixes `scripts/verify-fast.sh` for Bash strict mode so empty test and match filters no longer crash under `set -u`.
highlights: `verify-fast.sh` now guards empty `tests` and `matches` arrays before expanding them.
Git Bash and strict Bash users can run `scripts/verify-fast.sh` with no filters.
Added regression coverage that runs the shell script with empty arrays and nounset behavior.
No runtime behavior changed outside the verification script hotfix.
